title: NBA region DIDNOTCONVERGE with two virtual interface instances of the same type

features.name: class with virtual interface member variable
features.description: Code should include a class that declares a virtual interface as a member variable

features.name: two class instances with virtual refs to same interface type
features.description: Code should include two class instances holding virtual references to different instances of the same interface type

features.name: interface with clocking block
features.description: Code should include an interface that defines a clocking block with input and output signals

features.name: always_ff with combinational output path via assign
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block driving signals where a combinational assign depends on the registered outputs

features.name: NBA through virtual interface clocking block in class task
features.description: Code should include a class task performing non-blocking assignments through a virtual interface clocking block

features.name: fork_join_any with class tasks using virtual interfaces
features.description: Code should include fork-join_any launching class tasks that use virtual interface references
